content:
- Completed task-01 runner webhook HTTP mode execution, updated the task artifact to completed with `<passes>true</passes>`, and ran `.ralph/task_switch.sh` successfully.
- Final required gates are green: `make check`, `make lint`, and `make test` all passed; `make test-long` was not run. During validation I also cleaned stale user-owned PostgreSQL shared-memory files in `/dev/shm` so the required test lane could run again, and I serialized the bootstrap integration binary to reduce shm pressure.
- Next after quitting: stage all repo and `.ralph` changes, commit with the task-finished message including test evidence and the shm/bootstrap-harness note, push to origin, and stop.
